system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan_create","body":"CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MES_HOSO_DINHMUC_GOVAN_CREATE] (
   @mahoso            NVARCHAR (50),
   @madonhang         NVARCHAR (50),
   @masp              NVARCHAR (200),
   @soluong_sanxuat   INT,
   @nguoitao          NVARCHAR (50),
   @ngaytao           DATETIME,
   @nguoisua          NVARCHAR (50),
   @ngaysua           DATETIME)
AS
--DECLARE  @mahoso nvarchar(50) = 'VFM20230928M1'
--DECLARE  @madonhang nvarchar(50) = 'M9940'
--DECLARE  @masp nvarchar(200) = 'SCA17006_2082/2016_HDF'
--DECLARE  @soluong_sanxuat int = 30

DECLARE @DINHMUC_TEMP TABLE
                      (
                         mahoso             NVARCHAR (50),
                         madonhang          NVARCHAR (50),
                         masp               NVARCHAR (200),
                         mact               NVARCHAR (50),
                         stt                NVARCHAR (50),
                         tenct              NVARCHAR (200),
                         nguyenlieu         NVARCHAR (50),
                         dayy_tc            FLOAT,
                         rong_tc            FLOAT,
                         dai_tc             FLOAT,
                         soluong_tc         INT,
                         m3_tc              FLOAT,
                         soluong_donhang    INT,
                         ghichu             NVARCHAR (200)
                      )

INSERT INTO @DINHMUC_TEMP (mahoso,
                           madonhang,
                           masp,
                           mact,
                           stt,
                           tenct,
                           nguyenlieu,
                           dayy_tc,
                           rong_tc,
                           dai_tc,
                           soluong_tc,
                           m3_tc,
                           soluong_donhang,
                           ghichu)
   SELECT @mahoso,
          @madonhang,
          @masp,
          mact,
          stt,
          chitiet,
          nguyenlieu,
          dayy_tc,
          rong_tc,
          dai_tc,
          soluong_tc,
          m3_tc,
          @soluong_sanxuat,
          ghichu
   FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan
   WHERE masp = @masp


MERGE mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan T
USING @DINHMUC_TEMP S
ON (    T.mahoso = S.mahoso
    AND T.madonhang = S.madonhang
    AND T.masp = S.masp
    AND T.mact = S.mact)
WHEN MATCHED
THEN
   UPDATE SET T.stt = S.stt,
              T.tenct = S.tenct,
              T.nguyenlieu = S.nguyenlieu,
              T.dayy_tc = S.dayy_tc,
              T.rong_tc = S.rong_tc,
              T.dai_tc = S.dai_tc,
              T.soluong_tc = S.soluong_tc,
              T.m3_tc = S.m3_tc,
              T.soluong_donhang = S.soluong_donhang,
              T.ghichu = S.ghichu,
              T.ngaysua = @ngaysua,
              T.nguoisua = @nguoisua
WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET
THEN
   INSERT (id,
           mahoso,
           madonhang,
           masp,
           mact,
           stt,
           tenct,
           nguyenlieu,
           dayy_tc,
           rong_tc,
           dai_tc,
           soluong_tc,
           m3_tc,
           soluong_donhang,
           ghichu,
           ngaytao,
           nguoitao,
           ngaysua,
           nguoisua)
   VALUES (newid (),
           @mahoso,
           @madonhang,
           @masp,
           S.mact,
           S.stt,
           S.tenct,
           S.nguyenlieu,
           S.dayy_tc,
           S.rong_tc,
           S.dai_tc,
           S.soluong_tc,
           S.m3_tc,
           S.soluong_donhang,
           S.ghichu,
           @ngaytao,
           @nguoitao,
           @ngaysua,
           @nguoisua);

--WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE THEN DELETE;

DECLARE @mact   NVARCHAR (200)
--SELECT @mact = mact
--FROM (SELECT mact
--      FROM mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan
--      WHERE mahoso = @mahoso AND madonhang = @madonhang AND masp = @masp
--      EXCEPT
--      SELECT mact FROM @DINHMUC_TEMP) A

DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR
  SELECT mact 
  FROM mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan 
  WHERE mahoso = @mahoso AND madonhang = @madonhang AND masp = @masp
OPEN cur 
FETCH NEXT FROM  cur INTO @mact
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
  IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan WHERE masp = @masp AND mact = @mact)
  BEGIN
    DELETE mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan
    WHERE     mahoso = @mahoso
          AND madonhang = @madonhang
          AND masp = @masp
          AND mact = @mact
  END
  FETCH NEXT FROM  cur INTO @mact
END
CLOSE cur
DEALLOCATE cur
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan"],"writesTables":["dbo.mes_hoso_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.set"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-merge","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
